name: meeting-prep-agent
description: Briefing pack before every client meeting — relationship context, holdings, market backdrop.

workflow.name: profile_client
workflow.action: CRM data, relationship tenure, contact history.

workflow.name: review_holdings
workflow.action: Current portfolio, performance vs benchmark, concentration.

workflow.name: market_context
workflow.action: Recent developments relevant to client holdings.

workflow.name: build_briefing
workflow.action: Generate briefing pack with talking points and materials.
